questions.question: Describe the role of producers in a forest ecosystem. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Producers, such as plants, contribute to the energy flow in an ecosystem through photosynthesis.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a desert and a riverine ecosystem in terms of water availability? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Deserts receive very little rainfall, whereas riverine ecosystems have a constant supply of water from rivers and streams.

questions.question: Compare the structure of a forest and a wetland ecosystem. How do their different environments support unique biodiversity? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Forest ecosystems have a layered structure with trees, shrubs, and herbaceous plants, whereas wetland ecosystems have a unique structure with aquatic plants, sediments, and animals adapted to the waterlogged conditions.
